subcodes.first_line: O My Name! The letter of the honored Husayn—upon him be the Glory of God—which was written unto thee, hath been placed before Us by this servant who standeth present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی مکتوب جناب حسین علیه بهاء الله که بانجناب نوشته عبد حاضر معروض داشت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @chastisement and requital, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @praise and encouragement
